Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Speed

    • Uses of Speed in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return Speed 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Speed Speed.addAndReturnNew(double value, SpeedUnit unit, SpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided speed value and unit and returns a new speed instance using provided unit.
      Speed Speed.addAndReturnNew(Number value, SpeedUnit unit, SpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided speed value and unit and returns a new speed instance using provided unit.
      static Speed Speed.addAndReturnNew(Speed arg1, Speed arg2, SpeedUnit unit)
      Adds two speed instances.
      Speed Speed.addAndReturnNew(Speed s, SpeedUnit unit)
      Adds provided speed to current instance and returns a new speed.
      static Speed SpeedConverter.convertAndReturnNew(Speed input, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a speed instance to requested output unit.
      Speed SpeedFormatter.parse(String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine speed value and unit.
      Speed Speed.subtractAndReturnNew(double value, SpeedUnit unit, SpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided speed value and unit and returns a nw speed instance using provided unit.
      Speed Speed.subtractAndReturnNew(Number value, SpeedUnit unit, SpeedUnit resultUnit)
      Subtracts provided speed value and unit and returns a new speed instance using provided unit.
      static Speed Speed.subtractAndReturnNew(Speed arg1, Speed arg2, SpeedUnit unit)
      Subtracts two speed instances.
      Speed Speed.subtractAndReturnNew(Speed s, SpeedUnit unit)
      Subtracts provided speed to current instance and returns a new speed instance.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Speed.add(Speed speed)
      Adds provided speed and updates current speed.
      void Speed.add(Speed s, Speed result)
      Adds provided speed and stores the result into provided speed.

      Adds two speed instances and stores the result into provided instance.

      Adds two speed instances.

      Adds provided speed to current instance and returns a new speed.

      Converts a speed instance to provided output speed unit.

      Converts and updates a speed to requested output unit.

      Converts a speed to requested output unit.
      static Speed SpeedConverter.convertAndReturnNew(Speed input, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a speed instance to requested output unit.

      Subtracts provided speed and updates current speed.
      void Speed.subtract(Speed s, Speed result)
      Subtracts provided speed and stores the result into provided speed.
      static void Speed.subtract(Speed arg1, Speed arg2, Speed result)
      Subtracts two speed instances and stores the result into provided instance.

      Subtracts two speed instances.
